processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'EiRRthue', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end -- Check alter table @@table alter column mst char(32) create index i on @@table (mst) if @type = '0' delete @@table where mst in (select mst from edmruirothue) select @field = 'mst', @r = min(stt) from @@table where mst like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select a.* into #k from @@table a join edmruirothue b on a.mst = b.mst delete @@table where mst in (select mst from #k) -- select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.mst <> b.mst and a.mst = rtrim(b.mst)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, edmruirothue b with (index(PK_edmruirothue)) where a.mst = rtrim(b.mst)&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from edmruirothue a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.mst = rtrim(b.mst)' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into edmruirothue(mst, ten_dn, ten_dn2, ten_cq_thue, ngay_dong, tt_canh_bao, ghi_chu, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ' select @q = @q + ' ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' select @q = @q + 'select mst, ten_dn, '''', ten_cq_thue, ngay_dong, tt_canh_bao, ghi_chu, getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), '''', '''', ' select @q = @q + ' 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update edmruirothue set ten_dn = b.ten_dn, ten_cq_thue = b.ten_cq_thue, ngay_dong = b.ngay_dong, tt_canh_bao = b.tt_canh_bao, ghi_chu=b.ghi_chu, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from edmruirothue a, #k b where a.mst = b.mst end
